sharedRules.description:
If your Army Faction is ^^**Adepta Sororitas**^^, each unit from your army with this ability can perform one Act of Faith per phase. This is done using Miracle dice.

GAINING MIRACLE DICE
If your Army Faction is ^^**Adepta Sororitas**^^, you gain 1 Miracle dice:
- At the start of each battle round.
- Each time an ^^**Adepta Sororitas**^^ unit from your army is destroyed.

Each time you gain a Miracle dice, roll one D6. The number you roll is the value of that Miracle dice. This value cannot be changed or re-rolled, unless a rule specifically states otherwise. Keep your Miracle dice to one side – this is your Miracle dice pool.

PERFORMING AN ACT OF FAITH
Before making a dice roll for a model or unit from your army with the Acts of Faith ability, if you have one or more dice in your Miracle dice pool, that unit can perform an Act of Faith. If it does, select one of the dice from your Miracle dice pool to substitute that dice roll (if a roll involves more than one dice, e.g. a Charge roll or Battle-shock test, only a single dice can
be substituted). The dice that is being substituted is not rolled; instead the value of the selected Miracle dice is used as if it had been rolled (this counts as an unmodified dice roll of that value for all rules purposes). Each Miracle dice can only be selected for substitution once. Once all Miracle dice substitutions have been made, remove the chosen Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool, and roll all remaining, unsubstituted dice that are a part of the dice roll. You can use Miracle dice when a unit performs an Act of Faith for any of the following types of dice roll:
■ Advance roll
■ Battle-shock test
■ Charge roll
■ Damage roll
■ Hit roll
■ Saving throw
■ Wound roll
sharedRules.name: Acts of Faith

sharedRules.description: Each time an ADEPTA SORORITAS model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that model’s unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll, as well, if that model’s unit is Below Half-strength.
sharedRules.name: The Blood of Martyrs

sharedRules.description:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the following Vows of Atonement to be active for your army until the start of the next battle round. You can only select each Vow of Atonement once per battle.


The Path of the Penitent: Add 3" to the Move characteristic of PENITENT model from your army.


Absolution in Battle: Each time a unit from your army is selected to fight, if that units made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by PENITENT models in that unit.


Death Before Disgrace: Each time a PENITENT model from your army is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
sharedRules.name: Desperate for Redemption

sharedRules.description: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTA SORORITAS models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 6", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.
sharedRules.name: Fervent Purgation

sharedRules.description: Each Adepta Sororitas unit from your army can perform up to two Acts of Faith per phase, instead of just one.
sharedRules.name: Sacred Rites

sharedRules.description:
In your Command phase, you can select up to 3 ^^**Adepta Sororitas^^** units from your army (including units that are embarked within ^^**Transports^^**), until the start of your next Command phase, those units are Righteous. While a unit is Righteous:
■ Add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.
■ Improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.
■ Improve the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by ^^**Battle Sisters Squad^^**, ^^**Celestian Sacresants^^** and ^^**Paragon Warsuits^^** models in that unit by 1.
sharedRules.name: Righteous Purpose

sharedRules.description: While a ^^**Celestian Sacresants^^** unit from your army is not Battle‑shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of ^^**Celestian Sacresants^^** models in that unit.
sharedRules.name: Keywords

characteristics.$text: Anti-Psyker 2+, Devastating Wounds, Precision, Rapid Fire 1
characteristics.name: Keywords

characteristics.$text: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and those weapons have the [Precision] ability. In addition, each time the bearer fights, if one or more enemy models is destroyed by those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of that bearer; that unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for the bearer. If that test is passed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time the bearer uses an Act of Faith to substitute a saving throw, that saving throw is successful, irrespective of the value of the Miracle dice used.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit, and all other ranged weapons equipped by models that unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can discard up to 2 Miracle dice. Then, add 1 Miracle dice to your Miracle Dice pool showing a value equal to the sum of the two Miracle dice you discarded (to a maximum of 6).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, you can first discard up to 3 Miracle dice. For each Miracle dice just discarded, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. The bearer’s weapons have the [PRECISION] ability. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer’s unit is Righteous, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description
Description
characteristics.$text: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if this unit is **unengaged**, you can place this unit in **strategic reserves**.

ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll one Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool and return it to your Miracle dice pool with the new result you rolled. When doing so, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll up to 3 Miracle dice in this way instead.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Canoness^^** or **^^Palatine^^** model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. When the bearer is destroyed, you gain an additional D3 Miracle dice.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer has lost one or more wounds, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: CANONESS, PALATINE, or MINISTORUM PRIEST model only. The bearer gains the PENITENT keyword and, during the Declare Battle Formations step, can be attached to a REPENTIA SQUAD unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit is destroyed by a PENITENT unit from your army, you can discard 1 Miracle dice to gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: PENITENT model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: PENITENT model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, select one Vow of Atonement. Until the start of the next battle round, that Vow of Atonement is active for the bearer's unit in addition to any that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Vow of Atonement this battle.
characteristics.name: Description
Description
characteristics.$text:
(Once per turn, per unit) At the start of a phase, you can use this ability. If you do, select one of the abilities below: 
- **Rite of Revelation**: While this unit is shooting, enemy units have +6" detection range. 
- **Sermon of Intolerance**: This unit’s battle‑shock rolls automatically succeed. 
- **Catechism of Raging Fervour**: This unit has +1" M. 
- **Psalm of Righteous Smiting**: This unit’s attacks have +1 S. 
- **Chorus of Repudiation**: Attacks that target this unit with a S greater than this unit’s T have ‑1 to wound rolls.
This unit can perform 1 additional Act of Faith per phase.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time a Psychic Attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, you can first discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, that test is automatically passed.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per phase, when this unit is selected as the target of an attack, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets this unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: You can re-roll failed Out of Action tests taken for this unit, and each time this unit is Marked for Greatness, it gains an additional 2XP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This unit has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit is selected as the target of an attack, if this unit is Below Half-strength, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against that attack.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase, you gain 1 Miracle dice.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability and, at the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the end of your Command phase, if this model is your **^^Warlord^^** and is on the battlefield, you can spend 1CP. If you do, you gain D3 Miracle dice.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While a friendly **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** unit is within 6" of this unit, improve that unit's Leadership characteristic by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit performs an Act of Faith, the result of one of the Miracle dice used in that Act of Faith is first improved by 1 (to a maximum of 6).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: When selecting Agendas for a battle, you can select one **^^Adepta Soroitas^^** Agenda to be used in that battle in addition to any others being used in that battle.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: If the bearer is in your Crusade army, you can use one Crusade Blessing even if you are not the Underdog.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time an enemy unit selects the bearer's unit as a target of a charge, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test; if that test is failed, subtract 2 from the Charge roll made for that charge.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Living Saint^^** model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer's melee weapons by 1, and those weapons have the **[ANTI-CHARACTER 4+]**, **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** and **[PRECISION]** abilities.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Improve the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer's ranged weapons by 1, and those weapons have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** and **[ANTI-CHAOS 4+]** abilities.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Improve the bearer's Wounds, Leadership and Objective Control characteristics by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Saint Potentia^^** model only. When the bearer is destroyed, the Miracle dice you gain as a result is automatically a 6. At the end of the battle, the bearer gains 1 Saint point (whether destroyed or not).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save. Each time the bearer's unit is selected as the target of an attack, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 3+ invulnerable save.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Gain 3 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model is wholly within your opponent's deployment zone.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model gained more XP than any other unit from your Crusade army during that battle.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Gain 1 Saint point at the end of a battle for each Miracle dice remaining in your Miracle Dice pool (to a maximum of 2 Saint points).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model performed 3 or more Acts of Faith during that battle.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Gain 1 Saint point at the end of a battle if this model is below its Starting Strength. Gain 2 Saint points instead if this model was destroyed while within range of an objective marker.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Gain 3 Saint points each time this model gains a Martyr point.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model is within 6" of the centre of the battlefield.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model's unit did not fail a Battle-shock test during that battle.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model destroyed one or more enemy **^^Character^^** units during that battle. Gain an additional 2 Saint points if one of those destroyed units contained the enemy **^^Warlord^^**.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Gain 2 Saint points at the end of a battle if this model destroyed 5 or more enemy models during that battle.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each this model's unit is selected to fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, until the end of the phase, double the Strength characteristic of this model's melee weapons and those weapons have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, every enemy unit that is within 12" of this model and below its Starting Strength must take a Battle-shock test. If such a unit is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from Battle-shock tests taken for that unit this phase instead.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of any phase, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, this model regains all of its lost wounds.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the end of each player's Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this model's unit is selected to shoot, you can discard 1 Miracle die. If you do, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability and each time an attack made by such a weapon scores a Critical Wound, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, if you have one or more **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units on the battlefield and if your Crusade army was led in prayer before this battle, you can discard two Miracle dice. If you do, you intone the Hymns of Battle that battle round and, until the start of the next battle round, all **^^Adepta Sororitas Character^^** units in your army gain bonus depending on which Hymns of Battle you select. While a unit is Battle-shocked, it loses the bonus of any Hymns that would apply to it (if a rule would cause such a unit to no longer be Battle-shocked, any bonuses from Hymns that would apply to it apply once again).

When you intone Hymns of Battle, you can either select one Hymn to apply to units from your army from the list, or you can randomly select two by rolling two D6 and consulting the table (if a double is rolled, roll both dice again until two different results are rolled).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time an attack with an unmodified Damage characteristic of 1 is allocated to a model in this unit, add 1 to any armour saving throw made against that attack.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time this unit performs an Act of Faith, add 1 to the result of the dice being substituted (to a maximum of 6). Each time a Miracle dice with an unmodified result of a 6 is used when such a unit performs an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Improve the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in this unit by 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Dialogus^^** only. Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use if that Stratagem by 1CP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of the battle, you gain 1 miracle dice. If this model is your **^^Blessed Orator^^**, then you start the battle with 2 Miracle dice instead.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the start of each battle round, roll one D6 and consult the Hymns of Battle table. If you wish, you can then choose to discard 1 Miracle dice; if you do, then until the end of the battle round, that Hymn applies to this model's unit (duplicated Hymns of Battle are not cumulative, and have no additional effect).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If your army is Intoning Hymns of Battle, then while the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: At the end of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can re-roll one Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool and return it to your Miracle dice pool with the new result you rolled.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While a friendly **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** unit is within 6" of this model, that unit is considered to be a **^^Character^^** unit for the purposes of gaining bonuses for the Hymns of Battle rule.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While a friendly **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit performs an Act of Faith, roll one D6: one a 6, you gain 1 Miracle dice.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Imagifier^^** only. At the end of the battle, if this model is on the battlefield, you can select one additional **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** unit in your army to be Marked for Greatness.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Hospitaller^^** only. Once per battle, if this model is on the battlefield when an **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** unit from your army fails an Out of Action test, all **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** units from your army that are on the battlefield gain 1XP.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Dogmata^^** only. Once per battle, at the end of the battle, if this model is on the battlefield, you can select one other **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** unit from your Crusade army that has one or more Battle Traits and spend 1RP. If you do, select one Battle Trait that the unit has and replace it with a new Adepta Sororitas Battle Trait that the unit could have.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. Once per phase, when an attack is allocated to a model in the bearer's unit, you can discard 1 Miracle dice; if you do, the Damage characteristic of that attack is changed to 0.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: If this model is your **^^Blessed Orator^^**, you can intone Hymns of Battle up to twice during the battle, rather than only one (you must discard 2 Miracle dice each time you wish to do so). You cannot intone Hymns of Battle twice at the start of the same battle round using this Crusade Relic.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: If the bearer is your **^^Blessed Orator^^**, each time your army intones Hymns of Battle, if the bearer is on the battlefield, after selecting which Hymns will apply to your army, you can randomly select one additional Hymn of Battle to apply to your army (if you roll a result that you have already select, roll again until you result you have not rolled).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Adepta Sororitas^^** model only (excluding **^^Ministorum Priest^^** models). The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+. The first time the bearer loses one or more Wounds, at the end of the phase in which those wounds were lost, you gain 1 Miracle dice (the value of this Miracle dice is always a 6).
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: **^^Canoness^^**, **^^Ministorum Priest^^** or **^^Dialogus^^** only. The bearer can use the Once per Battle ability listed on their datasheet one additional time during the battle.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back, If your army is intoning Hymns of Battle this battle round, the bearer's unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Repentia Squad**^^
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Mortifiers**^^
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle, after this model's unit has performed a Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Seraphim Squad, Zephyrim Squad**^^
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [^^Lethal Hits^^] ability.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Adepta Sororitas**^^ unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: Anti-Psyker 2+, Devastating Wounds, Precision, Rapid Fire 1
characteristics.name: Keywords

modifiers.value: You cannot have both a heavy flamer and a multi-melta.
You cannot have both a heavy flamer and a multi-melta.

publications.publisher: 'Still no Lance rule on the only Lance in the game"
publications.publicationDate: If you're not on the Siscord what you doing with your life?
